Collect clinical outcome data in-person or remotely on any device. ![lightbulb-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/lightbulb-icon.svg) Built with regulatory insight to help medtech teams move faster with confidence. ![ai-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/ai-icon.svg) Find issues faster and make smarter decisions with less manual work. ![education-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/education-icon.svg) Tools and resources that help teams implement quickly and meet requirements. ![Asset 22@3x 1]() #### QMSR is coming. Is your quality system ready? This page is your one-stop resource for understanding what’s changing, what’s at stake, and how to stay compliant. ![Contact Sales](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/c0ac4c7c-1ce5-4f7f-9917-7641babf6ba1.png) ![Get a Demo](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/df8edfba-9502-444a-8575-76dad17db2c7.png) ![Contact Sales](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/c0ac4c7c-1ce5-4f7f-9917-7641babf6ba1.png) ![Get a Demo](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/df8edfba-9502-444a-8575-76dad17db2c7.png) # Corrective and Preventive Action Form ## Definition A corrective and preventive action form is used to initiate the CAPA process for a nonconformance event or to document a preventive action that is being implemented as the result of information or analysis from a qualified source. Medical device companies are required to establish and maintain a [corrective and preventive actions procedure and policies](https://www.greenlight.guru/blog/capa-process) in accordance with the guidance and regulations set out by the FDA and ISO for medical devices sold in the United States and around the world. The [corrective and preventive action](/blog/corrective-action-and-preventive-action-capa-medical-devices) form - or CAPA form - is one of the most important tools of the CAPA process. When a medical device company [identifies a non-conformance issue](https://www.greenlight.guru/blog/tips-handling-nonconformances), it must invoke its non-conformance management plan, which requires it to identify the problem, document it, evaluate it, segregate instances of nonconforming product and dispose of it in the most appropriate way. If the evaluation signals to a quality manager that a corrective action could be possible, the issue is escalated using a CAPA form. The CAPA form is the mechanism by which nonconformance issues are initiated into the CAPA process so they can turn into business process improvements. ## What's On A Corrective And Preventive Action Form? If done correctly, a single CAPA form can be used to track a nonconformance issue from its initiation into the CAPA process until its resolution. This ensures that all data pertaining to this specific CAPA issue can be accessed and viewed together. The important components of a CAPA form are: ## Greenlight Guru Helps Establish And Maintain Your CAPA Process And Documentation The FDA and authorities that regulate medical device companies around the world require the establishment and maintenance of a CAPA process within a medical device quality management system (QMS). Medical device companies must [document all CAPA events](https://www.greenlight.guru/blog/what-should-really-trigger-a-capa), maintaining policies and procedures

The important components of a CAPA form are: ## Greenlight Guru Helps Establish And Maintain Your CAPA Process And Documentation The FDA and authorities that regulate medical device companies around the world require the establishment and maintenance of a CAPA process within a medical device quality management system (QMS). Medical device companies must [document all CAPA events](https://www.greenlight.guru/blog/what-should-really-trigger-a-capa), maintaining policies and procedures for implementing CAPA plans and following document control procedures in accordance with international standards and FDA guidelines.
